image_dependency: Question explicitly says 'transition-state structure shown in the image,' so the core information is visual.
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the item cannot be solved reliably from text alone.
Selecting among SMILES options depends on reading the depicted molecular structure rather than extracting textual cues.
multi_step: Solver must interpret the drawn chemical structure and then map it to one of four SMILES choices.
This requires at least a visual-to-symbolic conversion plus option comparison, but the prompt does not clearly require longer chained reasoning.
Multiple choice format with 4 options adds comparison, yet no explicit calculation or multi-condition logic is stated.
verifiability: There is a single clear target answer in short_text form: 'CN(C)C1Cc2ccccc2N1'.
The provided choices allow straightforward exact-match checking against option text.
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and answer_type=short_text support reliable downstream verification.
